description_long: This bungalow features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a mix of modern and traditional design elements. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of brown and white materials, with vertical striping adding visual interest. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a metallic door and a small overhang, while the windows are arranged in a linear, symmetrical pattern. The roof is flat and appears to have some rooftop elements, possibly skylights or utility structures. The building sits low to the ground, emphasizing its single-story nature. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed bungalow with brown and white striped exterior walls, symmetrical windows, and a modern entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, metallic door, and a small overhang, with vertical striping on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown cladding and a linear arrangement of windows, with less detail on the entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brown wall with minimal window openings and rooftop elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the white and brown striping, with a secondary entrance or window detail.
